OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, e.g. 'urlscan'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_INTERVAL.description: Interval between two runs of the connector, in seconds.

CONNECTOR_LOOKBACK.description: How far to look back in days if the connector has never run or its last run is older than this value.

URLSCAN_URL.description: The Urlscan feed URL to query.

URLSCAN_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: Whether to create indicators for imported observables.

URLSCAN_UPDATE_EXISTING_DATA.description: Whether to update data already ingested into the platform.

URLSCAN_DEFAULT_TLP.description: Default TLP marking applied to imported data.

URLSCAN_DEFAULT_X_OPENCTI_SCORE.description: Default x_opencti_score applied to imported data.
